mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_student_relations (coach_id, student_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{studentId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_student_relations SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_student_relations WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM coach_student_relations WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM coach_student_relations WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coach_student_relations WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coach_student_relations WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM coach_student_relations WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM coach_student_relations WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
